title: Creator Toolbox
description: Dedicated to map authors and video creators, hoping this mudpack can help you. *About 100+ mods, startup takes only 1 minute!
body:
# Vanilla Plus

In Minecraft 1.20.1, this well-crafted modpack will bring players a new and improved gaming experience, integrating a number of useful and fun mods to improve your enjoyment of the game, from interface improvements to feature expansions.

The bundle is equipped with mods such as Modern UI and e4mc to optimize and upgrade the game interface to make it easier to operate and more beautiful, and also adds mods such as Not Enough Animations and [ET F] Entity Texture Features to enrich game animations and physical textures, making the game world more vivid and realistic. There is also a Dynamic FPS module, which can dynamically adjust the frame rate according to the game scene, ensuring smooth operation while taking into account the performance of the computer.

It also includes classic item management mods like Just Enough Items (JEI) that make it easy to quickly find and get what you need, while mods like Remove Reloading Screen and Game Menu Remove GFARB simplify the game's menus and interface, allowing players to focus more on the game.

In addition, mods such as Xaero's Minimap and Xaero's World Map, which are included in the modpack, provide players with powerful map navigation features to help you easily explore the vast Minecraft world. Mods such as Longer Chat History and Chat Heads have optimized the chat function to improve the communication and interaction experience between players.

Whether you're new to Minecraft or you're looking for a more enriching experience, this modpack is a unique way to enjoy the game and embark on a surprising and creative adventure in a block-built world.
